projectDescription: A browser-based tilemap and sprite editor for CPC-style retro game assets, backed by Firebase authentication and Firestore cloud storage.
keyFeatures: Browser-based tilemap editor with stamp, fill, and eraser tools
CPC sprite editor supporting Mode 0, Mode 1, and Mode 2 video modes
Firebase Auth with Google OAuth and email/password login
Firestore cloud persistence with auto-save (2 s debounce)
TMX import/export compatible with the Tiled map editor
Tileset PNG import/export from the right sidebar
Sprite PNG and JASC-PAL palette import/export
CPC ASM/BASIC byte-format sprite export with mask interleaving
Multi-map projects with per-map undo history (50 snapshots)
Zoom levels from 0.25× to 8× in the map editor
publicApiSurface: createMap(userId, projectId, { name, tileW, tileH, mapW, mapH, doubleWidth })
saveMap(userId, projectId, mapId, { name, config, mapTiles, tileset, tilesetBlobUrl })
createSprite(userId, projectId, { name, videoMode, width, height })
